docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT HOPKINS, MONIQUE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT HOPKINS, MONIQUE ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT HOPKINS, MONIQUE
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, PAUL COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUN-22-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

DEPT. #1, JUDGE HERBERT DONALDSON. C/C FOR CT. TRIAL. PL. W/ATTY. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIP W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. FOR REST. PREMISES AT 954 GEARY ST, #44. WRIT ISSUE IMMEDIATELY & B POSTED, BUT EVICTION STAYED TO 6-29-93. DEF. TO PAY $2,385 R&D. COSTS & ATTY FEES WVD. $550 SEC. DEP. RETAINED BY PL. POSSESSIONS LEFT DEEMED ABANDONED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOPKINS, MONIQUE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 954 GEARY ST, #44, S.F, CA. $2,385.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,385.00, STAYED UNTIL JUN-29-1993, $550 SECURITY DEPOSIT RETAINED BY PL. ANY POSSESSIONS LEFT ON PREMISES DEEMED ABANDONED. WRIT ISSUE IMMEDIATELY
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HOPKINS, MONIQUE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HOPKINS, MONIQUE
